purpose: Shared cross-language fixture for media artifact refs and event stream checkpoint semantics. Runtime-core stores durable refs, metadata, lineage, and checkpoints; it does not process codecs or own stream transport.

required_scenarios.name: media_artifact_ref_is_indexed_in_evidence
required_scenarios.description: A run creates a media artifact reference with portable metadata and lineage, and evidence exports a media_artifacts index.

required_scenarios.name: stream_checkpoint_ref_is_indexed_in_evidence
required_scenarios.description: A run creates a resumable stream checkpoint with stream id, consumer id, offset, optional chunk ref, and evidence exports a stream_checkpoints index.

preview_status: implemented by Python, Go, TypeScript, and Rust preview paths as artifact/ref semantics; full media processing and stream transport remain optional adapters
